# csgo-sharecode attribution

The desktop uses `csgo-sharecode` 5.0.0 to decode recorded CS2 crosshair share
codes. The decoded settings are rendered by DemoTracer's own SVG preview.

Upstream: <https://github.com/akiver/csgo-sharecode>

The package is consumed through npm and is not vendored here. Its MIT license
is retained below for attribution.
